title: Createmon
description: Lightweight Cobblemon + Create modpack, enhanced by several Create Addons and fakemons.
body:
Lightweight Cobblemon + Create modpack, enhanced by several Create Addons and original Cobblemon Fakemons that add fresh content without sacrificing performance.

This modpack is designed to let you automate nearly every aspect of your Cobblemon adventure, from resource gathering and item processing to advanced machinery that supports exploration, battling, and progression. Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, it offers a smooth and optimized experience focused on creativity, automation, and Pokémon-style gameplay, making it easy to build and manage your ideal Cobblemon world together.
